observed_strengths: PromptVault can request weakest-first bounded previews.
CLI scan can explicitly include a capped prompt stdout preview.
CLI improve can force deterministic local-rules recommendations.
observed_weaknesses: The repair queue still required callers to manually pipe scan results into separate improve calls.
There was no single command that selected weak prompts and returned local repair suggestions.
Batch repair needed a cap because it necessarily returns prompt bodies and revised prompts.

selected_candidate.name: deterministic batch repair command
selected_candidate.reason: Combine weakest-first scan and local-rules improvement into one capped no-export CLI command for AutoResearch repair loops.
selected_candidate.success_metric: repair --json --limit 100 --count 3 returns three local-rules prompt/recommendation pairs, no Markdown export, and first repair starts from a weak prompt.

safety_controls: Repair always uses no-export scan options.
Repair batches are capped at 10 records.
